mathematical_lineage.Aitchison_1986: CLR transform, simplex geometry, Aitchison distance
mathematical_lineage.Higgins_2026: CNT tensor decomposition, recursive depth sounder, metric dual involution

engine_config._description: Active values from the USER CONFIGURATION block at top of cnt.py. Two runs with identical config and input produce identical content_sha256. Two runs with different config produce different content_sha256 - that is correct.

input._description: Source data identity, hashes, and ordering declaration.

tensor._description: Per-record compositional state. coda_standard fields follow Aitchison/Egozcue/Shannon. higgins_extensions are HUF-framework readings of the same simplex; see schema §8 for the mapping.

stage1._description: Cube-face projections and per-record metric ledger formatted for plate display. HUF/CBS-specific.

bridges._description: Connections to dynamical / control / information theory.

entropy_rate.method: mean of d/dt H along trajectory

depth._description: Recursive depth sounder, period-2 attractor, impulse response. Wholly Higgins-framework — no CoDa-canon analogue.

diagnostics._description: Engine self-checks: EITT residuals, lock events, degeneracy flags, content hash.

eitt_residuals.note: Empirical observation of trajectory smoothness under temporal decimation, not a geometric theorem. Shannon entropy is not scale-invariant; the apparent preservation reflects the compositional smoothness of the trajectory, not Aitchison invariance.

degeneracy_flags.message: Records appear sorted by carrier Energy; depth recursion may be degenerate.
degeneracy_flags.condition: composition[0] is monotonic across all records
